questions.question: What virus infected one in four adults in Botswana and Zimbabwe by 1998?
What did Garrison Keillor say was 'the little town that time forgot, that the decades cannot improve'?
Whose operatic music did Nazis goose-step to at the Nuremburg rallies, in the 1930s?
What drug did Freud claim could be used to wean addicts off morphine?
What former heavyweight champ lasted only three days in U.S. Marine boot camp, in 1997?
Who noted: 'If you can count your millions you are not a billionaire'?
